message: Copper has risen 15.3% over 90 days. Current price £9,850/t exceeds your alert threshold of £9,500/t.
action: Review upcoming copper requirements and delay non-urgent orders.

message: Stainless Steel 304 up 12.4% in 90 days. Nickel supply disruptions from Indonesia driving costs.
action: Order only essential stock. Monitor LME nickel prices weekly.

message: Nylon 66 has dropped 9.8% over 90 days — best price in 12 months.
action: Consider increasing stock by 4-6 weeks. Renegotiate supplier contract — currently 9% above market.

message: Mild Steel down 3.5% over 30 days. Historical Q3 recovery pattern suggests price rise likely in 6-8 weeks.
action: Good window to buy forward 2-4 weeks additional stock.

message: Your supplier (Direct Plastics Ltd) is charging £4.20/kg vs market average of £3.85/kg — 9.1% above market.
action: Contact supplier to renegotiate or request quotes from alternative suppliers.

message: Cromwell Tools pricing carbide inserts 7.2% above market. MSC Direct and Sandvik direct pricing available significantly lower.
action: Request competitive quotes from MSC Direct or contact Sandvik for direct supply agreement.
